sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, department FROM users WHERE status = #{status} AND name = #{name} AND department = #{dept} ORDER BY created_at
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, status, department FROM users
<trim prefix="WHERE" prefixOverrides="AND|OR" suffix="ORDER BY created_at" suffixOverrides=",">
    <if test="status != null">status = #{status} AND</if>
    <if test="name != null">name = #{name} AND</if>
    <if test="dept != null">department = #{dept},</if>
</trim>
